records.m_Talk_ENG: Operations Team! We've reached Area Theta!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Operations Team! We've reached Area Theta!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Operations Team! We've reached Area Theta!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commence the purification operation! Open fire on the front line!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commence the purification operation! Open fire on the front line!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commence the purification operation! Open fire on the front line!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blasted C.O.s...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blasted C.O.s...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blasted C.O.s...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't leave a single one standing! Wipe them all out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't leave a single one standing! Wipe them all out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't leave a single one standing! Wipe them all out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Khan, the operations team just reported in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Khan, the operations team just reported in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Khan, the operations team just reported in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This village is gone too. The C.O.s reduced it to rubble.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This village is gone too. The C.O.s reduced it to rubble.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This village is gone too. The C.O.s reduced it to rubble.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see. What a shame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see. What a shame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see. What a shame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The floating island villages never had proper defenses against the Counterside Effect.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The floating island villages never had proper defenses against the Counterside Effect.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The floating island villages never had proper defenses against the Counterside Effect.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration needs to change policy and begin relocation programs for the natives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration needs to change policy and begin relocation programs for the natives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration needs to change policy and begin relocation programs for the natives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They have their own homelands, Wade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They have their own homelands, Wade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They have their own homelands, Wade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even before the Administration Failure, this Amazon basin was theirs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even before the Administration Failure, this Amazon basin was theirs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even before the Administration Failure, this Amazon basin was theirs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we intrude rashly under the pretense of management, their civilization itself could vanish one day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we intrude rashly under the pretense of management, their civilization itself could vanish one day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we intrude rashly under the pretense of management, their civilization itself could vanish one day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Civilization survives only if people survive!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Civilization survives only if people survive!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Civilization survives only if people survive!

records.m_Talk_ENG: They need the Administration! Their ignorance is what leads them to worship the Counterside Effect!
records.m_Talk_DEU: They need the Administration! Their ignorance is what leads them to worship the Counterside Effect!
records.m_Talk_FRA: They need the Administration! Their ignorance is what leads them to worship the Counterside Effect!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ignorance? Watch your words, Wade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ignorance? Watch your words, Wade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ignorance? Watch your words, Wade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thinking ourselves superior is nothing but modern arrogance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thinking ourselves superior is nothing but modern arrogance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thinking ourselves superior is nothing but modern arrogance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They have their own order, Wade.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They have their own order, Wade.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They have their own order, Wade.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They may even understand the Counterside Effect better than the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They may even understand the Counterside Effect better than the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They may even understand the Counterside Effect better than the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But still...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But still...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Senior! We found a survivor in the village...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Senior! We found a survivor in the village...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Senior! We found a survivor in the village...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's the child's condition...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's the child's condition...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's the child's condition...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fortunately, no serious injuries. No signs of Corruption Syndrome either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fortunately, no serious injuries. No signs of Corruption Syndrome either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fortunately, no serious injuries. No signs of Corruption Syndrome either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the child hasn't spoken, likely from shock.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the child hasn't spoken, likely from shock.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the child hasn't spoken, likely from shock.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's strange.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's strange.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's strange.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This child grew up in a village in a Corrupted Area with no Corruption Inhibitors...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This child grew up in a village in a Corrupted Area with no Corruption Inhibitors...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This child grew up in a village in a Corrupted Area with no Corruption Inhibitors...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yet, how could she be perfectly healthy...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yet, how could she be perfectly healthy...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yet, how could she be perfectly healthy...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hello, little one. Can you talk to this old man?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hello, little one. Can you talk to this old man?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hello, little one. Can you talk to this old man?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you not like me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you not like me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you not like me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, hard to tell when you won't speak.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, hard to tell when you won't speak.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, hard to tell when you won't speak.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is that arrowhead in your hand...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is that arrowhead in your hand...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is that arrowhead in your hand...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could that be the legendary...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could that be the legendary...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could that be the legendary...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sob* ...Grandfather.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sob* ...Grandfather.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sob* ...Grandfather.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My little treasure hunter, you've come all this way through danger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My little treasure hunter, you've come all this way through danger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My little treasure hunter, you've come all this way through danger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, look how you've grown. Time seems to fly by.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, look how you've grown. Time seems to fly by.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, look how you've grown. Time seems to fly by.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Old man Khan, I've already explained the situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Old man Khan, I've already explained the situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Old man Khan, I've already explained the situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Time is critical and you need to return to the Campamento Administration at once.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Time is critical and you need to return to the Campamento Administration at once.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Time is critical and you need to return to the Campamento Administration at once.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anomalies in Grand Dimension Crevices worldwide, eh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anomalies in Grand Dimension Crevices worldwide, eh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anomalies in Grand Dimension Crevices worldwide, eh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Wade hadn't protected me, I wouldn't be alive now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Wade hadn't protected me, I wouldn't be alive now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Wade hadn't protected me, I wouldn't be alive now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And even Wade's fate is uncertain...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And even Wade's fate is uncertain...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And even Wade's fate is uncertain...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I refuse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I refuse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I refuse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will not give up the Golden Vale's Legacy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will not give up the Golden Vale's Legacy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will not give up the Golden Vale's Legacy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, come on! Old man, this isn't the time for stubbornness!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, come on! Old man, this isn't the time for stubbornness!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, come on! Old man, this isn't the time for stubbornness!

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a fellow treasure hunter, Indiana G.A.P., you know this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a fellow treasure hunter, Indiana G.A.P., you know this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a fellow treasure hunter, Indiana G.A.P., you know this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every Artifact carries its own <color=#ffd34c>history</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every Artifact carries its own <color=#ffd34c>history</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every Artifact carries its own <color=#ffd34c>history</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And mankind always learns from history.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And mankind always learns from history.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And mankind always learns from history.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives...
records.m_Talk_DEU: There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives...
records.m_Talk_FRA: There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This legend must be a death cry left by a world before it collapsed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This legend must be a death cry left by a world before it collapsed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This legend must be a death cry left by a world before it collapsed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We must listen to that cry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We must listen to that cry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We must listen to that cry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why we must find the Golden Vale's Legacy. It's now, or never.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why we must find the Golden Vale's Legacy. It's now, or never.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why we must find the Golden Vale's Legacy. It's now, or never.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The only problem is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The only problem is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The only problem is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've lost every Artifact the expedition gathered so far...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've lost every Artifact the expedition gathered so far...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've lost every Artifact the expedition gathered so far...

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...* Figures.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...* Figures.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...* Figures.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course the stubborn Master Khan wouldn't quit. Yup!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course the stubborn Master Khan wouldn't quit. Yup!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course the stubborn Master Khan wouldn't quit. Yup!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why we went and collected them all already!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why we went and collected them all already!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why we went and collected them all already!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The first clue was the <color=#ffd34c>eye of the Black Forest Guardian Spider</color>...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The first clue was the <color=#ffd34c>eye of the Black Forest Guardian Spider</color>...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The first clue was the <color=#ffd34c>eye of the Black Forest Guardian Spider</color>...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So we dismantled the Moderator's camera lens.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So we dismantled the Moderator's camera lens.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So we dismantled the Moderator's camera lens.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Second was <color=#ffd34c>the false face worshipped by the blind</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Second was <color=#ffd34c>the false face worshipped by the blind</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Second was <color=#ffd34c>the false face worshipped by the blind</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So we took the mask worshipped by the remnants of the Society cultists.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So we took the mask worshipped by the remnants of the Society cultists.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So we took the mask worshipped by the remnants of the Society cultists.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the third is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the third is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the third is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sita, you're right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sita, you're right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sita, you're right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The third is the Golden Arrowhead I hold.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The third is the Golden Arrowhead I hold.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The third is the Golden Arrowhead I hold.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All the Artifacts to reveal the Golden Vale gathered at last...
records.m_Talk_DEU: All the Artifacts to reveal the Golden Vale gathered at last...
records.m_Talk_FRA: All the Artifacts to reveal the Golden Vale gathered at last...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps this truly is fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps this truly is fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps this truly is fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come, all of you. Follow this old man.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come, all of you. Follow this old man.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come, all of you. Follow this old man.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For I know where the Golden Vale lies hidden...
records.m_Talk_DEU: For I know where the Golden Vale lies hidden...
records.m_Talk_FRA: For I know where the Golden Vale lies hidden...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Somewhere in this plain, the Golden Vale awaits.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Somewhere in this plain, the Golden Vale awaits.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Somewhere in this plain, the Golden Vale awaits.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? This empty field is where the Golden Vale is supposed to be?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? This empty field is where the Golden Vale is supposed to be?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? This empty field is where the Golden Vale is supposed to be?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like nothing but a barren wasteland.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like nothing but a barren wasteland.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like nothing but a barren wasteland.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So it was like that, after all?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So it was like that, after all?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So it was like that, after all?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why no one ever found it the usual way...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why no one ever found it the usual way...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why no one ever found it the usual way...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Mi Rinae, did you figure something out?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Mi Rinae, did you figure something out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Mi Rinae, did you figure something out?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. It's simple.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. It's simple.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. It's simple.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Golden Vale wasn't a ruin that exists in reality.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Golden Vale wasn't a ruin that exists in reality.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Golden Vale wasn't a ruin that exists in reality.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was a <color=#ffd34c>Corrupted Area</color> that only manifests under certain conditions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was a <color=#ffd34c>Corrupted Area</color> that only manifests under certain conditions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a <color=#ffd34c>Corrupted Area</color> that only manifests under certain conditions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Corrupted Area...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Corrupted Area...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Corrupted Area...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Remarkable, Indiana G.A.P. Sharp eyes indeed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Remarkable, Indiana G.A.P. Sharp eyes indeed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Remarkable, Indiana G.A.P. Sharp eyes indeed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the one chasing something impossible, old man.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the one chasing something impossible, old man.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the one chasing something impossible, old man.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Corrupted Area is just an area formed by the Counterside Effect.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Corrupted Area is just an area formed by the Counterside Effect.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Corrupted Area is just an area formed by the Counterside Effect.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once it erupts for some reason...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once it erupts for some reason...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once it erupts for some reason...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It overlays the Normalside with the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It overlays the Normalside with the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It overlays the Normalside with the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In artist terms, it's like overlapping layers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In artist terms, it's like overlapping layers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In artist terms, it's like overlapping layers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's a strange metaphor...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's a strange metaphor...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's a strange metaphor...

records.m_Talk_ENG: C'mon, just roll with it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: C'mon, just roll with it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: C'mon, just roll with it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, the old man tried to trigger the Counterside Effect <color=#ffd34c>deliberately</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, the old man tried to trigger the Counterside Effect <color=#ffd34c>deliberately</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, the old man tried to trigger the Counterside Effect <color=#ffd34c>deliberately</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To summon ruins from the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To summon ruins from the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To summon ruins from the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why he needed <color=#ffd34c>Artifacts from the same source</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why he needed <color=#ffd34c>Artifacts from the same source</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why he needed <color=#ffd34c>Artifacts from the same source</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I see...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I see...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I see...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Senior Khan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Senior Khan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Senior Khan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you resonate the Artifacts to spark a local Counterside Effect...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you resonate the Artifacts to spark a local Counterside Effect...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you resonate the Artifacts to spark a local Counterside Effect...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Without knowing exactly where in the Counterside the Golden Vale is, it's useless.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Without knowing exactly where in the Counterside the Golden Vale is, it's useless.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Without knowing exactly where in the Counterside the Golden Vale is, it's useless.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How were you ever going to locate a ruin that doesn't exist in reality?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How were you ever going to locate a ruin that doesn't exist in reality?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How were you ever going to locate a ruin that doesn't exist in reality?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're right...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're right...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're right...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I gathered oral legends, historical records, Artifact analyses...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I gathered oral legends, historical records, Artifact analyses...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I gathered oral legends, historical records, Artifact analyses...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And endless coordinate data from the Counterside Effects in this region.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And endless coordinate data from the Counterside Effects in this region.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And endless coordinate data from the Counterside Effects in this region.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a result...
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a result...
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a result...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I found this arrowhead reacts only beyond worlds at a <color=#ffd34c>specific location</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I found this arrowhead reacts only beyond worlds at a <color=#ffd34c>specific location</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I found this arrowhead reacts only beyond worlds at a <color=#ffd34c>specific location</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the place it points to is <color=#ffd34c>here</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the place it points to is <color=#ffd34c>here</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the place it points to is <color=#ffd34c>here</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait! If we have to scour this whole plain, we don't have nearly enough time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait! If we have to scour this whole plain, we don't have nearly enough time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait! If we have to scour this whole plain, we don't have nearly enough time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I hear it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I hear it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I hear it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lady Sita? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lady Sita? What do you mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lady Sita? What do you mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Somewhere...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Somewhere...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Somewhere...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hear... voices...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hear... voices...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hear... voices...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Voices? I don't hear anything...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Voices? I don't hear anything...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Voices? I don't hear anything...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This way...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This way...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This way...

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-she's moving like she's possessed...
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-she's moving like she's possessed...
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-she's moving like she's possessed...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could she be...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could she be...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could she be...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Follow Sita!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Follow Sita!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Follow Sita!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If she uses her gift, we may uncover something here...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If she uses her gift, we may uncover something here...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If she uses her gift, we may uncover something here...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thirty east. Place the Eye of the Spider here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thirty east. Place the Eye of the Spider here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thirty east. Place the Eye of the Spider here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Forty-five southwest. Put the False Face here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Forty-five southwest. Put the False Face here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Forty-five southwest. Put the False Face here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the last one...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the last one...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the last one...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sita! Did you find something...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sita! Did you find something...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sita! Did you find something...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Golden Arrowhead goes there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Golden Arrowhead goes there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Golden Arrowhead goes there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't move from that spot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't move from that spot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't move from that spot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're resonating the Artifacts? Trying to reveal the Golden Vale?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're resonating the Artifacts? Trying to reveal the Golden Vale?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're resonating the Artifacts? Trying to reveal the Golden Vale?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You really found the ruin's location... this easily...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You really found the ruin's location... this easily...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You really found the ruin's location... this easily...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The voices told me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The voices told me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The voices told me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So this is the Golden Vale ruin...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So this is the Golden Vale ruin...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So this is the Golden Vale ruin...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This easily...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This easily...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This easily...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look, Ms. Mi Rinae!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look, Ms. Mi Rinae!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look, Ms. Mi Rinae!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There was nothing there a moment ago... and now ruins appeared!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There was nothing there a moment ago... and now ruins appeared!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There was nothing there a moment ago... and now ruins appeared!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Old man Khan! Is that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Old man Khan! Is that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Old man Khan! Is that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes... it seems we've found the Golden Vale ruin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes... it seems we've found the Golden Vale ruin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes... it seems we've found the Golden Vale ruin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone's waiting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone's waiting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone's waiting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: L-Lady Sita says someone is waiting inside the ruins.
records.m_Talk_DEU: L-Lady Sita says someone is waiting inside the ruins.
records.m_Talk_FRA: L-Lady Sita says someone is waiting inside the ruins.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Operations Team! We've reached Area Theta!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Operations Team! We've reached Area Theta!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Operations Team! We've reached Area Theta!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Commence the purification operation! Open fire on the front line!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Commence the purification operation! Open fire on the front line!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Commence the purification operation! Open fire on the front line!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Blasted C.O.s...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Blasted C.O.s...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Blasted C.O.s...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't leave a single one standing! Wipe them all out!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't leave a single one standing! Wipe them all out!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't leave a single one standing! Wipe them all out!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Khan, the operations team just reported in.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Khan, the operations team just reported in.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Khan, the operations team just reported in.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This village is gone too. The C.O.s reduced it to rubble.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This village is gone too. The C.O.s reduced it to rubble.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This village is gone too. The C.O.s reduced it to rubble.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see. What a shame.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see. What a shame.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see. What a shame.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The floating island villages never had proper defenses against the Counterside Effect.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The floating island villages never had proper defenses against the Counterside Effect.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The floating island villages never had proper defenses against the Counterside Effect.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration needs to change policy and begin relocation programs for the natives.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration needs to change policy and begin relocation programs for the natives.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration needs to change policy and begin relocation programs for the natives.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They have their own homelands, Wade.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They have their own homelands, Wade.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They have their own homelands, Wade.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even before the Administration Failure, this Amazon basin was theirs.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even before the Administration Failure, this Amazon basin was theirs.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even before the Administration Failure, this Amazon basin was theirs.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we intrude rashly under the pretense of management, their civilization itself could vanish one day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we intrude rashly under the pretense of management, their civilization itself could vanish one day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we intrude rashly under the pretense of management, their civilization itself could vanish one day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Civilization survives only if people survive!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Civilization survives only if people survive!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Civilization survives only if people survive!

root.m_Talk_ENG: They need the Administration! Their ignorance is what leads them to worship the Counterside Effect!
root.m_Talk_DEU: They need the Administration! Their ignorance is what leads them to worship the Counterside Effect!
root.m_Talk_FRA: They need the Administration! Their ignorance is what leads them to worship the Counterside Effect!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ignorance? Watch your words, Wade.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ignorance? Watch your words, Wade.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ignorance? Watch your words, Wade.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thinking ourselves superior is nothing but modern arrogance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thinking ourselves superior is nothing but modern arrogance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thinking ourselves superior is nothing but modern arrogance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They have their own order, Wade.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They have their own order, Wade.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They have their own order, Wade.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They may even understand the Counterside Effect better than the Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They may even understand the Counterside Effect better than the Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They may even understand the Counterside Effect better than the Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But still...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: But still...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: But still...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Senior! We found a survivor in the village...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Senior! We found a survivor in the village...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Senior! We found a survivor in the village...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's the child's condition...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's the child's condition...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's the child's condition...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fortunately, no serious injuries. No signs of Corruption Syndrome either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fortunately, no serious injuries. No signs of Corruption Syndrome either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fortunately, no serious injuries. No signs of Corruption Syndrome either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the child hasn't spoken, likely from shock.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the child hasn't spoken, likely from shock.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the child hasn't spoken, likely from shock.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it's strange.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it's strange.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it's strange.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This child grew up in a village in a Corrupted Area with no Corruption Inhibitors...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This child grew up in a village in a Corrupted Area with no Corruption Inhibitors...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This child grew up in a village in a Corrupted Area with no Corruption Inhibitors...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yet, how could she be perfectly healthy...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yet, how could she be perfectly healthy...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yet, how could she be perfectly healthy...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hello, little one. Can you talk to this old man?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hello, little one. Can you talk to this old man?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hello, little one. Can you talk to this old man?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you not like me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you not like me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you not like me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, hard to tell when you won't speak.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, hard to tell when you won't speak.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, hard to tell when you won't speak.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is that arrowhead in your hand...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is that arrowhead in your hand...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is that arrowhead in your hand...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Could that be the legendary...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Could that be the legendary...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Could that be the legendary...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sob* ...Grandfather.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sob* ...Grandfather.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sob* ...Grandfather.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My little treasure hunter, you've come all this way through danger.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My little treasure hunter, you've come all this way through danger.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My little treasure hunter, you've come all this way through danger.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, look how you've grown. Time seems to fly by.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, look how you've grown. Time seems to fly by.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, look how you've grown. Time seems to fly by.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Old man Khan, I've already explained the situation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Old man Khan, I've already explained the situation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Old man Khan, I've already explained the situation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Time is critical and you need to return to the Campamento Administration at once.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Time is critical and you need to return to the Campamento Administration at once.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Time is critical and you need to return to the Campamento Administration at once.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anomalies in Grand Dimension Crevices worldwide, eh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anomalies in Grand Dimension Crevices worldwide, eh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anomalies in Grand Dimension Crevices worldwide, eh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If Wade hadn't protected me, I wouldn't be alive now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If Wade hadn't protected me, I wouldn't be alive now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If Wade hadn't protected me, I wouldn't be alive now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And even Wade's fate is uncertain...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And even Wade's fate is uncertain...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And even Wade's fate is uncertain...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I refuse.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I refuse.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I refuse.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will not give up the Golden Vale's Legacy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will not give up the Golden Vale's Legacy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will not give up the Golden Vale's Legacy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, come on! Old man, this isn't the time for stubbornness!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, come on! Old man, this isn't the time for stubbornness!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, come on! Old man, this isn't the time for stubbornness!

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a fellow treasure hunter, Indiana G.A.P., you know this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As a fellow treasure hunter, Indiana G.A.P., you know this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As a fellow treasure hunter, Indiana G.A.P., you know this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Every Artifact carries its own <color=#ffd34c>history</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Every Artifact carries its own <color=#ffd34c>history</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Every Artifact carries its own <color=#ffd34c>history</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And mankind always learns from history.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And mankind always learns from history.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And mankind always learns from history.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away...
root.m_Talk_DEU: When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away...
root.m_Talk_FRA: When the radiant sun is veiled by roots, its light fading away...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The heavens will split open, and where earth and cloud meet, a golden city will appear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives...
root.m_Talk_DEU: There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives...
root.m_Talk_FRA: There, the Golden Vale's Legacy will save countless lives...

root.m_Talk_ENG: This legend must be a death cry left by a world before it collapsed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This legend must be a death cry left by a world before it collapsed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This legend must be a death cry left by a world before it collapsed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We must listen to that cry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We must listen to that cry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We must listen to that cry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why we must find the Golden Vale's Legacy. It's now, or never.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why we must find the Golden Vale's Legacy. It's now, or never.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why we must find the Golden Vale's Legacy. It's now, or never.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The only problem is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The only problem is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The only problem is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We've lost every Artifact the expedition gathered so far...
root.m_Talk_DEU: We've lost every Artifact the expedition gathered so far...
root.m_Talk_FRA: We've lost every Artifact the expedition gathered so far...

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...* Figures.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...* Figures.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...* Figures.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course the stubborn Master Khan wouldn't quit. Yup!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course the stubborn Master Khan wouldn't quit. Yup!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course the stubborn Master Khan wouldn't quit. Yup!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why we went and collected them all already!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why we went and collected them all already!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why we went and collected them all already!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The first clue was the <color=#ffd34c>eye of the Black Forest Guardian Spider</color>...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The first clue was the <color=#ffd34c>eye of the Black Forest Guardian Spider</color>...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The first clue was the <color=#ffd34c>eye of the Black Forest Guardian Spider</color>...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So we dismantled the Moderator's camera lens.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So we dismantled the Moderator's camera lens.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So we dismantled the Moderator's camera lens.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Second was <color=#ffd34c>the false face worshipped by the blind</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Second was <color=#ffd34c>the false face worshipped by the blind</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Second was <color=#ffd34c>the false face worshipped by the blind</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So we took the mask worshipped by the remnants of the Society cultists.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So we took the mask worshipped by the remnants of the Society cultists.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So we took the mask worshipped by the remnants of the Society cultists.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the third is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the third is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the third is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sita, you're right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sita, you're right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sita, you're right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The third is the Golden Arrowhead I hold.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The third is the Golden Arrowhead I hold.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The third is the Golden Arrowhead I hold.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All the Artifacts to reveal the Golden Vale gathered at last...
root.m_Talk_DEU: All the Artifacts to reveal the Golden Vale gathered at last...
root.m_Talk_FRA: All the Artifacts to reveal the Golden Vale gathered at last...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps this truly is fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps this truly is fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps this truly is fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come, all of you. Follow this old man.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come, all of you. Follow this old man.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come, all of you. Follow this old man.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For I know where the Golden Vale lies hidden...
root.m_Talk_DEU: For I know where the Golden Vale lies hidden...
root.m_Talk_FRA: For I know where the Golden Vale lies hidden...

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're here...
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're here...
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're here...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Somewhere in this plain, the Golden Vale awaits.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Somewhere in this plain, the Golden Vale awaits.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Somewhere in this plain, the Golden Vale awaits.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? This empty field is where the Golden Vale is supposed to be?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? This empty field is where the Golden Vale is supposed to be?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? This empty field is where the Golden Vale is supposed to be?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Looks like nothing but a barren wasteland.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Looks like nothing but a barren wasteland.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Looks like nothing but a barren wasteland.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So it was like that, after all?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So it was like that, after all?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So it was like that, after all?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why no one ever found it the usual way...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why no one ever found it the usual way...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why no one ever found it the usual way...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ms. Mi Rinae, did you figure something out?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ms. Mi Rinae, did you figure something out?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ms. Mi Rinae, did you figure something out?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. It's simple.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. It's simple.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. It's simple.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Golden Vale wasn't a ruin that exists in reality.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Golden Vale wasn't a ruin that exists in reality.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Golden Vale wasn't a ruin that exists in reality.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was a <color=#ffd34c>Corrupted Area</color> that only manifests under certain conditions.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was a <color=#ffd34c>Corrupted Area</color> that only manifests under certain conditions.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was a <color=#ffd34c>Corrupted Area</color> that only manifests under certain conditions.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A Corrupted Area...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A Corrupted Area...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A Corrupted Area...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Remarkable, Indiana G.A.P. Sharp eyes indeed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Remarkable, Indiana G.A.P. Sharp eyes indeed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Remarkable, Indiana G.A.P. Sharp eyes indeed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're the one chasing something impossible, old man.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're the one chasing something impossible, old man.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're the one chasing something impossible, old man.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A Corrupted Area is just an area formed by the Counterside Effect.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A Corrupted Area is just an area formed by the Counterside Effect.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A Corrupted Area is just an area formed by the Counterside Effect.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once it erupts for some reason...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once it erupts for some reason...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once it erupts for some reason...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It overlays the Normalside with the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It overlays the Normalside with the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It overlays the Normalside with the Counterside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In artist terms, it's like overlapping layers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In artist terms, it's like overlapping layers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In artist terms, it's like overlapping layers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's a strange metaphor...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's a strange metaphor...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's a strange metaphor...

root.m_Talk_ENG: C'mon, just roll with it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: C'mon, just roll with it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: C'mon, just roll with it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, the old man tried to trigger the Counterside Effect <color=#ffd34c>deliberately</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, the old man tried to trigger the Counterside Effect <color=#ffd34c>deliberately</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, the old man tried to trigger the Counterside Effect <color=#ffd34c>deliberately</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To summon ruins from the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To summon ruins from the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To summon ruins from the Counterside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why he needed <color=#ffd34c>Artifacts from the same source</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why he needed <color=#ffd34c>Artifacts from the same source</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why he needed <color=#ffd34c>Artifacts from the same source</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I see...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I see...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I see...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But Senior Khan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But Senior Khan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But Senior Khan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you resonate the Artifacts to spark a local Counterside Effect...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you resonate the Artifacts to spark a local Counterside Effect...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you resonate the Artifacts to spark a local Counterside Effect...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Without knowing exactly where in the Counterside the Golden Vale is, it's useless.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Without knowing exactly where in the Counterside the Golden Vale is, it's useless.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Without knowing exactly where in the Counterside the Golden Vale is, it's useless.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How were you ever going to locate a ruin that doesn't exist in reality?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How were you ever going to locate a ruin that doesn't exist in reality?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How were you ever going to locate a ruin that doesn't exist in reality?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're right...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're right...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're right...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I gathered oral legends, historical records, Artifact analyses...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I gathered oral legends, historical records, Artifact analyses...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I gathered oral legends, historical records, Artifact analyses...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And endless coordinate data from the Counterside Effects in this region.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And endless coordinate data from the Counterside Effects in this region.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And endless coordinate data from the Counterside Effects in this region.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a result...
root.m_Talk_DEU: As a result...
root.m_Talk_FRA: As a result...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I found this arrowhead reacts only beyond worlds at a <color=#ffd34c>specific location</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I found this arrowhead reacts only beyond worlds at a <color=#ffd34c>specific location</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I found this arrowhead reacts only beyond worlds at a <color=#ffd34c>specific location</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the place it points to is <color=#ffd34c>here</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the place it points to is <color=#ffd34c>here</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the place it points to is <color=#ffd34c>here</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait! If we have to scour this whole plain, we don't have nearly enough time!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait! If we have to scour this whole plain, we don't have nearly enough time!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait! If we have to scour this whole plain, we don't have nearly enough time!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I hear it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I hear it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I hear it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lady Sita? What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lady Sita? What do you mean?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lady Sita? What do you mean?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Somewhere...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Somewhere...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Somewhere...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hear... voices...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hear... voices...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hear... voices...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Voices? I don't hear anything...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Voices? I don't hear anything...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Voices? I don't hear anything...

root.m_Talk_ENG: This way...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This way...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This way...

root.m_Talk_ENG: S-she's moving like she's possessed...
root.m_Talk_DEU: S-she's moving like she's possessed...
root.m_Talk_FRA: S-she's moving like she's possessed...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Could she be...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Could she be...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Could she be...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Follow Sita!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Follow Sita!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Follow Sita!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If she uses her gift, we may uncover something here...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If she uses her gift, we may uncover something here...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If she uses her gift, we may uncover something here...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thirty east. Place the Eye of the Spider here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thirty east. Place the Eye of the Spider here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thirty east. Place the Eye of the Spider here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Forty-five southwest. Put the False Face here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Forty-five southwest. Put the False Face here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Forty-five southwest. Put the False Face here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the last one...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the last one...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the last one...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sita! Did you find something...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sita! Did you find something...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sita! Did you find something...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Golden Arrowhead goes there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Golden Arrowhead goes there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Golden Arrowhead goes there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't move from that spot.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't move from that spot.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't move from that spot.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're resonating the Artifacts? Trying to reveal the Golden Vale?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're resonating the Artifacts? Trying to reveal the Golden Vale?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're resonating the Artifacts? Trying to reveal the Golden Vale?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You really found the ruin's location... this easily...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You really found the ruin's location... this easily...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You really found the ruin's location... this easily...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The voices told me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The voices told me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The voices told me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So this is the Golden Vale ruin...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So this is the Golden Vale ruin...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So this is the Golden Vale ruin...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This easily...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This easily...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This easily...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look, Ms. Mi Rinae!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Look, Ms. Mi Rinae!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look, Ms. Mi Rinae!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There was nothing there a moment ago... and now ruins appeared!
root.m_Talk_DEU: There was nothing there a moment ago... and now ruins appeared!
root.m_Talk_FRA: There was nothing there a moment ago... and now ruins appeared!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Old man Khan! Is that...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Old man Khan! Is that...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Old man Khan! Is that...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes... it seems we've found the Golden Vale ruin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes... it seems we've found the Golden Vale ruin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes... it seems we've found the Golden Vale ruin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Someone's waiting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Someone's waiting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Someone's waiting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: L-Lady Sita says someone is waiting inside the ruins.
root.m_Talk_DEU: L-Lady Sita says someone is waiting inside the ruins.
root.m_Talk_FRA: L-Lady Sita says someone is waiting inside the ruins.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Someone...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Someone...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Someone...?
